description:
Per-frame object detection. RF-DETR (Apache-2.0, default) is a fast closed-set detector over 80 COCO classes (person, car, dog, etc.). MM-Grounding-DINO (Apache-2.0/BSD-3) is the open-vocab option: type a prompt to detect anything. 
Image in, bounding boxes + labels + centroids out. 
Use as a fast per-frame gate before heavier models. For pixel masks use Segmentation.

input.description: AVI image stream to run detection on.

output.description: Annotated image as raw stream - pipe to any node accepting image input.
JSON array of detections: [{label, score, box, centroid}].

threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0–1.0) to include a detection
threshold.title: Confidence threshold

prompt.description: Example: "person . car . dog" (period or comma-separated list) or "red car" / "person in a hat" (described object). Returns all matching regions. Matches objects and attributes — not spatial relationships, so "the car on the left" returns all cars, not just the left one.
prompt.title: Detection prompt

threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0–1.0) to include a detection
threshold.title: Confidence threshold

title: Object Detection
